since_last: 77% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.07%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 77% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -0.20% · Gold +0.21% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 77% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.07%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.07%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -23.96%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +7.09%, INTC +6.81%, AMAT +6.32%, ASML +5.96%, POWL +5.76%. Laggards: IBM -23.96%, ISRG -6.29%, ADBE -3.39%, SAP -2.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.02% at $137.47
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
